name: Mcmillan Shakespeare Limited
analysis: MMS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$19.2950, stop A$18.7308, target A$20.9876 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
